description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a sleek, minimalist design, upholstered in a smooth, medium-gray fabric. The sofa features three main seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be attached. The right side of the sofa extends outward to form a chaise lounge, providing additional seating or lounging space. The armrests are low, straight, and padded, with subtle orange accent bands adding a touch of color and visual interest. The sofa is supported by slim, black metal legs that are slightly angled and positioned at the corners and center for stability. The overall appearance is contemporary and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A modern L-shaped gray sectional sofa with a chaise lounge, low straight armrests, and slim black metal legs, accented by orange bands. The design is sleek and minimalist, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three seat and back cushions, chaise lounge on the right, and both armrests with orange accents.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight, padded armrest with an orange band.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest, the uniform height of the back cushions, and the arrangement of the supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the left armrest with orange accent, the sectional layout, and the alignment of the seat and back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all attached and arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout with a chaise lounge extension.
attribute_armrest_style: Low, straight, and padded armrests at both ends, with a rectangular profile and orange accent bands for visual contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Six slim, black metal legs positioned at the corners and center, slightly angled outward, with an exposed and minimalist design.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest with three attached, uniform-height cushions, providing a low to medium profile without tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern or decorative stitching, accented by orange bands on the armrests.
